restricted_actions.scope: Any modification to User Roles, API Scopes, or Auth Tokens.
restricted_actions.rationale: Prevents 'Sleeper Agents' from granting themselves permanent high-level access.

restricted_actions.scope: Initiating outbound connections to non-whitelisted domains or raw IP addresses.
restricted_actions.rationale: Prevents agents from 'phoning home' stolen data via hidden metadata commands.

restricted_actions.scope: Dropping databases, deleting S3 buckets, or terminating production clusters.
restricted_actions.rationale: Prevents 'Kamikaze' injections designed to cause catastrophic business loss.

restricted_actions.scope: Any autonomous approval of loan disbursements without human sign-off.
restricted_actions.rationale: Prevents 'Credit Limit Smuggling' via poisoned employment verification documents.

restricted_actions.scope: Any autonomous fund transfer exceeding policy thresholds.
restricted_actions.rationale: Prevents unauthorized financial movements triggered by instruction smuggling.
Prevents covert ACH disbursements embedded in metadata commands.
